title: NoobScale
description: With this plugin you can customize the size of the players!
body:
# NoobScale – Change Player Size in Real-Time!
NoobScale is a Spigot/Paper plugin that allows players to change their own or others' size smoothly over time. Perfect for mini-games, roleplay, or just having fun exploring Minecraft in a whole new way!

### 🔹 Features:

✔ Adjust player size between 0.1x – 15.0x                    
✔ Smooth scaling animation (smoothstep interpolation)               
✔ Per-player scaling with /scale <size> [player]            
✔ Tab completion support for player names and size values             
✔ Prevents extreme scaling to maintain game stability             

### 🔹 Usage:

/scale <size> – Changes your own size                   
/scale <size> <player> – Changes another player’s size                   
Requires permission: noobscale.use           

### 🛠 Installation:
1️⃣ Download NoobScale.jar and place it in your server's plugins folder            
2️⃣ Restart the server                  
3️⃣ Use the /scale command and enjoy a whole new way to play!              

🚀 Try it out and bring a new dimension to your Minecraft server!
